title: AashishH15/Lexicon
summary: A local-first, offline AI writing assistant. Grammar, rewriting & tone entirely on your machine.

title: DocRoms/Kronn
summary: Self-hosted control plane for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Ollama). Shared MCPs, reusable workflows, AI audit that makes any repo AI-friendly. Engineering, not prompting : smaller prompts, fewer hallucinations, lower token bill.

title: robzilla1738/vibe-codr
summary: Vibe Codr — a local-first coding agent for desktop and terminal, with planning, subagent orchestration, memory, Git review, and any-model support.

title: aivinay/switchboard
summary: Privacy-aware, local-first router for your CLI coding agents (Codex, Claude Code) and local LLMs (Ollama) — keeps sensitive prompts on-device and cuts premium-model usage.

title: seshakiran/local-speech-to-speech
summary: Private, fully local realtime voice assistant with Gemma 4, Parakeet STT, Silero VAD, and Qwen3-TTS

title: nodetool-ai/nodetool
summary: The open creative AI workspace

title: nk1044/auto-researcher
summary: Autonomous AI agent that continuously improves a software repo — hypothesis → parallel subagents → test → commit, forever.

title: DuckTapeKiller/dive
summary: Dive is a secure, local-first desktop client for Ollama and Pi agentic AI. Features an ultra-compact offline RAG engine for indexing massive book libraries, MCP tool integration, sandboxed custom skills, PDF extraction, and macOS daemon support.

title: Markgatcha/memos
summary: MemOS - Universal local-first persistent memory layer for AI agents and LLMs

title: Kalicorp/kalicorp-kali-lite
summary: Kali-Lite — Modèles IA frugaux souverains (Qwen3 8B 8 Go + Qwen3.5 9B Vision 10 Go) • 100 % local • Ollama • Cross-platform

title: chipi/agentic-ai-homelab
summary: How I work with agentic AI: personal patterns, homelab infra (vLLM, Ollama, Grafana Alloy, LibreChat), project scaffolding. Not best practices - what I run.

title: codecentric/c4-genai-suite
summary: c4 GenAI Suite

title: Nano-Collective/nanocoder
summary: An open coding agent for your terminal, built by a community collective rather than a company. Bring your own model, keep your code on your machine, and owe nothing to anyone.

title: nimbus-agent/Nimbus
summary: On-call intelligence for DevOps and platform teams. Local-first AI agent over your tools — HITL-gated, MCP-native, AGPL-3.0.

title: backtest-kit/backtest-ollama-crontab
summary: A TypeScript monorepo demonstrating how to code Ollama outline-based risk filter, with a 15-minute crontab doing live and backtest both Telegram-channel ingestion. Parses signals from a public Telegram channel, asks the LLM whether each signal is safe to trade

title: llm-works/llm-infer
summary: LLM inference server with native, vLLM, and Ollama backends, including a client to interact with multiple LLM providers

title: manningmichael2/595BowersHub
summary: Self-hosted personal AI assistant platform — 3-layer routing, native Python skills, local + cloud model hybrid, React PWA

title: Kiln-AI/Kiln
summary: Build, Evaluate, and Optimize AI Systems. Includes evals, RAG, agents, fine-tuning, synthetic data generation, dataset management, MCP, and more.

title: JakeAve/llama-herd
summary: MCP server for Ollama agents

title: steveisanoob1-oss/modelkeeper
summary: Keep your app alive when Ollama or LM Studio silently evicts your model — prevent it (TTL heartbeats, config doctor) and survive it (warm-and-retry).
